title: Kireji Part Config
description: Schema for part.json files defining component behavior and methods.

abstract.description: Whether or not the part should be considered a subpart of its parent part (abstract = false) or an uninstanceable prototype for other parts (abstract = true).

extends.description: The relative or absolute host name of the part that this part inherits from. The default value is `part`.

methods.description: A map of method names to their expected arguments.

additionalProperties.description: An array of strings representing the parameter names for this method.

order.description:
An optional string array of subpart keys representing the explicit order that the subparts should take in the part's subpart array.
This affects how parts are iterated over and how they are integrated into the hash function.

additionalProperties.description: Custom property specific to this part implementation.
